creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214455
jtc-1.76.diff

Amended:
 * Bumped DISTVERSION to 1.76 and updated distinfo.
 * Added new compiler configuration options and minor tweaks.
 * Imported patches from upstream [1] addressing issues raised by me [2].

1: https://github.com/ldn-softdev/jtc/commit/92a5116e5524c0b6d2f539db7b5cc9fdd7c5b8ab
2: https://github.com/ldn-softdev/jtc/issues/19, https://github.com/ldn-softdev/jtc/issues/20

Changelog:
 * https://github.com/ldn-softdev/jtc/releases/1.76

Tested:
 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 3.3.4).
